deviations.description: The requirement in Version 2 introduces an obligation to 'administer additional anesthesia every 20 minutes' for patients with high anesthesia tolerance after local anesthesia is administered. The BPMN process model only includes the activity 'Ask Patient About Pain Level' every 20 minutes and does not contain any activity for administering additional anesthesia at this interval. Therefore, the process does not fulfill the new, stricter requirement.
